calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-02-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-27-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Ksenia Tsenin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sarah Lerschen #6213.
Ansel Kinney, Esq. appeared for and with the plaintiff Phyllis Evans Swindells was sworn and direct examined.
Order waiving appearance of live witness is in the court's file

No appearance by defaulted defendant William Howard Evans.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants as follows:

Damages $315,750.00
Attoreny Fees $2,000.00
Costs $630.00 for a total judgment in the amount of $318,380.00
Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-01-2012 Continued To Oct-17-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-02-2012 Continued To Jun-15-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610
